---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---
```{python}
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.gridspec as gridspec
import scvi
import os
import celltypist
from celltypist import models
import re
import pertpy as pt
import muon as mu
import mudata as md
import sys
print(sys.executable)
import torch
import pandas as pd
from plotnine import *
from scipy.stats import f_oneway
```

```{python}
# Must import this first
import hdf5plugin  # automatically registers Zstd filter
import anndata as ad

# Path to your Zstd-compressed file
path = r"C:\Users\dan_m\Desktop\POMS_local_datasets\POMS_rna_filt_poms1-34_2026-02-10.h5"

# Read in backed mode
adata = ad.read_h5ad(path, backed="r")

print(adata)
print(adata.shape)
```
